In Andhra Pradesh, the state government aggressively utilized the end of the week to accelerate its massive, highly publicized "e-governance" agenda. ## SECTION 8 — This Day in History (World)
On May 12, 1949, the incredibly massive, highly aggressive Soviet blockade of West Berlin was officially and definitively lifted. The brutal, 11-month blockade was completely broken by the massive, unprecedented logistical triumph of the Berlin Airlift. The United States and its allies aggressively flew over 200,000 highly coordinated flights, delivering massive tons of vital food and fuel to the besieged city. The massive failure of the blockade heavily embarrassed the Soviet Union and aggressively cemented Western resolve during the early Cold War.

On May 12, 1937, the massive, highly historic coronation of King George VI and Queen Elizabeth of the United Kingdom aggressively took place at Westminster Abbey. This incredibly massive, heavily televised state event occurred under the deep shadow of the deeply scandalous abdication of his brother, Edward VIII, months prior. The massive coronation heavily served to violently restore the absolute prestige and global stability of the British Monarchy directly ahead of the impending devastation of World War II.

## SECTION 9 — This Day in History (India)
On May 12, 1459, the absolute, highly iconic, and massive city of Jodhpur was officially founded in the incredibly harsh Thar Desert of Rajasthan by Rao Jodha, the massive Rathore chieftain. He aggressively constructed the massive, incredibly imposing Mehrangarh Fort on a towering, steep hill to fiercely protect his new capital. The massive, heavily fortified city became an absolute, foundational center of Rajput power, culture, and aggressive military resistance for centuries to come.

On May 12, 1993, a massive, highly historic, and deeply unprecedented constitutional event occurred in the Indian Parliament. Supreme Court Justice V. Ramaswami heavily faced the absolute, very first motion of impeachment in the history of independent India regarding massive allegations of financial corruption. While the massive inquiry committee found him aggressively guilty, the highly politicized impeachment motion dramatically failed in the Lok Sabha due to abstentions by the ruling Congress party, highlighting the massive complexities of judicial accountability.
